mapper.select: SELECT A.ADMN_NUMB, A.ADMN_IDXX, A.PASS_WORD, A.ADMN_NAME, A.AUTH_CODE, C.SORT_ORDER AS AUTH_LEVEL, A.DEPT_CODE, A.FAIL_CNTX, A.LGIN_DATE, A.REGI_DATE FROM TM_ADMINX A LEFT JOIN TB_CODEXD C ON C.COMM_CODE = 'AUTH_CODE' AND C.COMD_CODE = A.AUTH_CODE AND NVL(C.USEE_YSNO, 'Y') = 'Y' WHERE A.ADMN_IDXX = #{admnIdxx}
mapper.update: UPDATE TM_ADMINX SET FAIL_CNTX = 0, LGIN_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE ADMN_NUMB = #{admnNumb}
